class.name: ResonanceSOFAAsset
class.brief_description: HRTF SOFA file as Resource with volume and normalization.
class.description: Assign to ResonanceRuntimeConfig.hrtf_sofa_asset for custom HRTFs with gain and norm control. Load .sofa via load_from_file() or import .sofa in editor. volume_db adjusts loudness (0 = unity). norm_type: None or RMS (normalize across directions).

members.member: Raw .sofa file bytes. Set via load_from_file or importer.
Volume correction in dB. 0 = unity. Different SOFA files may need adjustment for mix balance.
Normalization: 0 = None, 1 = RMS (equalize volume across directions).

method.name: load_from_file
method.description: Load .sofa file from path. Sets sofa_data. Returns OK on success.
